description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed crew-neck with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry cleanDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not iron on print or embroideryGet moving with this white T-shirt from the Athletic Department collection from nike. The classic, comfortable Fit is complemented by the bold graphic lettering of the words "Air tight and outta sight", while the cotton fabric provides all day comfort. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a strong, aggressive look.
